task.zh: 紧急刹车！让小车先快后慢，最终刚好停在终点线上！
task.en: Emergency brake! Go fast then slow down, stopping exactly at the finish line!

hints.zh: 减速时曲线会变平——斜率变小
hints.en: When slowing down, the curve flattens — slope decreases

hints.zh: 斜率就是速度！曲线越陡 = 越快
这就是导数的直觉——变化的快慢
hints.en: This is the intuition of derivatives — the rate of change
